identity.name: Alphagency Admin 2025
identity.vibe: Futuristic Glassmorphism, Deep Space, Neon Data
principles: Glass is the surface, Data is the light

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 glass-heavy z-50 border-r border-white/10 hidden md:flex flex-col
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all group relative overflow-hidden

topbar.style: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full glass border-b border-white/10 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-8

main.style: min-h-screen bg-[#02040A] text-foreground pl-0 md:pl-64 pt-16 relative overflow-x-hidden

kpi.wrapper: glass p-6 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/30 transition-all duration-500
kpi.value: text-3xl font-bold text-white mt-2 mb-1 tracking-tight
kpi.label: text-sm text-muted-foreground font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
kpi.icon: p-3 rounded-xl bg-white/5 text-primary mb-4 w-fit group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:bg-primary/20 group-hover:text-white

chart.wrapper: glass p-6 rounded-2xl h-full flex flex-col

table.header: bg-white/5 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-muted-foreground py-4 px-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary/25 rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-muted-foreground hover:text-white rounded-xl px-4 py-2 transition-all

inputs.field: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all outline-none

setup: Install fonts: Add 'Outfit' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts to index.css
Update tailwind.config.js: Add custom colors (neon palette) and extend theme
Global CSS: Define .dark variables for the deep space theme
implementation_strategy: 1. LAYOUT: Build the 'GlassShell' layout component (Sidebar + Topbar + Main Content Area). Use the 'backgrounds' image as a subtle fixed overlay with low opacity (5%) in the body.
2. DASHBOARD: Create a Bento Grid layout for the Overview page. Top row: 4 KPI cards. Middle: Large Chart + Recent Activity. Bottom: Quick Actions.
3. COMPONENTS: Refactor existing Shadcn components (Card, Button, Input, Table) to use the 'glass' styles defined above. Remove all white backgrounds.
4. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style them with gradients (defs) and neon strokes. Hide grid lines or make them very subtle (white/5).
5. ANIMATION: Add 'framer-motion' for page transitions and card hover effects (scale 1.02).
6. TABLES: Ensure tables have transparent backgrounds and use border-bottom for separation. No zebra striping, just hover effects.
critical_rules: NEVER use solid white backgrounds for containers. Always use 'bg-white/5' or similar glass styles.
Ensure text contrast. If background is dark, text must be white/gray-200.
Use 'backdrop-blur-xl' for the sidebar and topbar to ensure content behind is readable but blurred.
Do not touch the public website code. Only modify /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/* and related components.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
